title: Mac OSX Style Shortcuts for RDP sessions. Translates OSX shortcuts to PC equivalent

rules.description: Mac OSX RDP: Cmd+Left/Right to Home/End
Mac OSX RDP: Cmd+Shift+Left/Right to Shift+Home/End
Mac OSX RDP: Cmd+Tab to Alt+Tab
Mac OSX RDP: Copy/Paste/Cut - Cmd+c/Cmd+v/Cmd+x to Ctrl+c/Ctrl+v/Ctrl+x
Mac OSX RDP: Option+(Shift+)Left/Right to Ctrl+(Shift+)Left/Right

description: Mac OSX RDP: Undo - Cmd+z to Ctrl+z
Mac OSX RDP: Redo -  Cmd+Shift+z to Ctrl+Shift+z
Mac OSX RDP: Select-All - Cmd+(Shift+)a to Ctrl+(Shift+)a
Mac OSX RDP: Save - Cmd+(shift+)s to Ctrl+(Shift+)s
Mac OSX RDP: New - Cmd+(shift+)n to Ctrl+(Shift+)n
Mac OSX RDP: Reload browser page - Cmd+(Shift+)r to (Ctrl+)F5
Mac OSX RDP: New Tab - Cmd+(Shift+)t to Ctrl+(Shift)t
Mac OSX RDP: Find - Cmd+(shift+)f to Ctrl+(Shift+)f
Mac OSX RDP: Open - Cmd+(shift+)o to Ctrl+(Shift+)o
Mac OSX RDP: Close Window - Cmd+(shift+)w to Ctrl+(Shift+)w
Mac OSX RDP: Fn+Space To Switch Input (Left Shift+Left Alt)
Mac OSX RDP: Cmd+Space To Switch Input (Left Shift+Left Alt)
Mac OSX RDP: Cmd+Space To Switch Input (Left Shift+Left Ctrl)
Mac OSX RDP: Quit Application - Cmd+q to Alt+F4
Citrix: Quit Application - Cmd+q to Alt+F4 (as Cmd+Opt+F4)
Mac OSX RDP: Browser open location - Cmd+l to Ctrl+L

manipulators.description: Mac OSX RDP: Browser open location - Cmd+l to Ctrl+L
Mac OSX RDP: Option+Backspace to Ctrl+Backspace
Mac OSX RDP: Fn+Option+Backspace to Fn+Ctrl+Backspace
Mac OSX RDP: Command+Up/Down to Ctrl+Home/End
Mac OSX RDP: Command+Shift+Up/Down to Ctrl+Shift+Home/End
Mac OSX RDP DE @: Option+L to Alt_GR+Q
Mac OSX RDP DE |: Option+7 to Alt_GR+<
Mac OSX RDP DE \: Option+Shift+7 to Alt_GR+?
Mac OSX RDP DE ~: Option+n to Alt_GR++
Mac OSX RDP DE [: Option+5 to Alt_GR+8
Mac OSX RDP DE ]: Option+6 to Alt_GR+9
Mac OSX RDP DE {: Option+8 to Alt_GR+7
Mac OSX RDP DE }: Option+9 to Alt_GR+0
Mac OSX RDP: Option+Backspace/Delete to Ctrl+Backspace/Delete
Mac OSX RDP: Cmd to Ctrl - Cmd+(shift+)<letter> to Ctrl+(Shift+)<letter>
Mac OSX RDP: Cmd to Ctrl
